description_html: Superior hydration than water alone, without any sugar. Delicate and floral, this luscious stone fruit flavor delights taste buds with notes of pear and pineapple. It's 3x the electrolytes of the leading sports drink and made for refreshing, on-the-go hydration.

description_html: The energy you want, the hydration you need. Experience the taste of vibrant pineapple complemented by notes of zippy yuzu flavor. Every serving contains approximately 100mg of natural caffeine* and 3x the electrolytes of the leading sports drink.

name: Zero Sugar Splash Pack
description_html: Experience Sugar-Free hydration during the summer heat with this Zero Sugar Splash Pack. Sip on Strawberry Watermelon, with notes of ripe, red strawberry and candy watermelon; White Peach is delicate and floral, this luscious stone fruit flavor delights taste buds with notes of pear and pineapple; Get set for a sunny state of mind with Mango Pineapple, bursting flavors of sweet, candied mango, fresh, vibrant pineapple, and subtle hints of vanilla; enjoy a meld of classic succulent raspberry, tangy orange, and lime zest flavors with Rainbow Sherbet. Hydrate faster than water alone with no artificial sweeteners and 3x the electrolytes of the leading sports drink.
